Class Controller

java.lang.Object
Controller.Controller
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable, Agent
public class Controller extends Object implements Agent

    • sendAll

    • run

      public void run()
      The main loop of the controller that processes commands. It continues until the game state is marked as done.
      Specified by:
      run in interface Runnable
